verseText: I am my beloved's, and his desire is for me.
marriageMeaning: Romance isn't ungodly—marital desire can be holy and bonding. Your spouse choosing you daily is a gift.
prayerPrompt: Lord, help us enjoy each other with honor and joy. Renew the spark between us.
actionPrompt: Send a flirty-but-honoring message to your spouse today.

verseText: My beloved is mine, and I am his.
marriageMeaning: Mutual belonging creates security. You're not just roommates—you're chosen partners.
prayerPrompt: God, help us live out our belonging to each other with intention.
actionPrompt: Tell your spouse one specific reason you're glad they're yours.

verseText: May your fountain be blessed, and may you rejoice in the wife of your youth... may you always be captivated by her love.
marriageMeaning: God designed marriage to include delight and captivation. Pursue that with your spouse.
prayerPrompt: Father, help me stay captivated by my spouse and find joy in our love.
actionPrompt: Plan a date night focused purely on enjoying each other's company.

verseText: Two are better than one... If either of them falls down, one can help the other up.
marriageMeaning: Marriage is designed for mutual support. You're stronger together than apart.
prayerPrompt: Lord, help us remember we're on the same team, especially when life gets hard.
actionPrompt: Ask your spouse: 'Where do you need my support right now?'

verseText: For this reason a man will leave his father and mother and be united to his wife, and they will become one flesh.
marriageMeaning: Your marriage takes priority over your family of origin. Protecting your unity is essential.
prayerPrompt: God, help us protect our oneness and put our marriage first.
actionPrompt: Discuss one area where you need to strengthen your 'us' boundaries.

verseText: How good and pleasant it is when God's people live together in unity!
marriageMeaning: Unity in marriage brings blessing and peace to your home. It's worth fighting for.
prayerPrompt: Father, make our home a place of harmony and pleasant unity.
actionPrompt: Choose peace over being right in your next disagreement today.

verseText: A gentle answer turns away wrath, but a harsh word stirs up anger.
marriageMeaning: Tone matters more than you think. Soft starts prevent unnecessary damage.
prayerPrompt: God, help our words bring peace, not pain.
actionPrompt: Redo one sentence gently. Before responding in tension, take a breath first.

verseText: Everyone should be quick to listen, slow to speak and slow to become angry.
marriageMeaning: Listening first shows respect. Your spouse wants to be heard before being fixed.
prayerPrompt: Lord, teach me to listen with my whole heart before I speak.
actionPrompt: In your next conversation, listen fully before responding. Count to 3 first.

verseText: Do not let any unwholesome talk come out of your mouths, but only what is helpful for building others up.
marriageMeaning: Your words have power to build up or tear down. Choose to construct, not destroy.
prayerPrompt: Help me speak words that build my spouse up today.
actionPrompt: Replace one criticism with an encouraging word today.

verseText: Bear with each other and forgive one another if any of you has a grievance against someone. Forgive as the Lord forgave you.
marriageMeaning: Forgiveness isn't optional—it's the air your marriage breathes. Unforgiveness poisons intimacy.
prayerPrompt: God, help me forgive as You've forgiven me, even when it's hard.
actionPrompt: Release one grudge you've been holding. Say it out loud: 'I choose to forgive.'

verseText: For if you forgive other people when they sin against you, your heavenly Father will also forgive you.
marriageMeaning: Forgiveness frees you both. Holding onto hurt only chains you to the past.
prayerPrompt: Father, give me the strength to forgive and the wisdom to heal.
actionPrompt: Write down what you need to forgive, then pray over it and let it go.

verseText: Get rid of all bitterness, rage and anger... Be kind and compassionate to one another, forgiving each other.
marriageMeaning: Bitterness has no place in a thriving marriage. Kindness and compassion pave the way forward.
prayerPrompt: Lord, root out any bitterness in my heart and replace it with compassion.
actionPrompt: Do one kind act for your spouse today, especially if there's unresolved tension.

verseText: Whatever is true, whatever is noble, whatever is right, whatever is pure... think about such things.
marriageMeaning: What you dwell on shapes your relationship. Guard your thoughts about your spouse.
prayerPrompt: Help me guard my mind and protect our oneness from negative thinking.
actionPrompt: Remove one mental trigger today. Replace a negative thought with gratitude.

verseText: We take captive every thought to make it obedient to Christ.
marriageMeaning: You can choose your thoughts. Don't let negative patterns about your spouse run wild.
prayerPrompt: God, help me take every thought captive and align my mind with Your truth.
actionPrompt: When a negative thought about your spouse arises, immediately replace it with something you appreciate.

verseText: Do not conform to the pattern of this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind.
marriageMeaning: The world's view of marriage is often toxic. Let God's truth reshape how you see your spouse.
prayerPrompt: Transform my thinking, Lord. Help me see my marriage through Your eyes.
actionPrompt: Identify one worldly expectation you've placed on your marriage and surrender it.

verseText: Love is patient, love is kind. It does not envy, it does not boast, it is not proud.
marriageMeaning: Patience is love in action. Rushing your spouse or the process damages connection.
prayerPrompt: Lord, grow patience in me. Help me love without rushing.
actionPrompt: Practice patience with your spouse today in one specific area where you're usually impatient.

verseText: The fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, patience, kindness, goodness, faithfulness, gentleness and self-control.
marriageMeaning: Patience is a fruit of the Spirit. If you're running low, ask God for more.
prayerPrompt: Holy Spirit, fill me with Your fruit—especially patience and gentleness.
actionPrompt: Before reacting to your spouse today, pause and ask the Spirit for patience.

verseText: A person's wisdom yields patience; it is to one's glory to overlook an offense.
marriageMeaning: Not every offense needs a response. Sometimes wisdom means letting small things go.
prayerPrompt: Give me wisdom to know what to address and what to overlook.
actionPrompt: Choose to overlook one minor annoyance from your spouse today.

verseText: Husbands, love your wives, just as Christ loved the church and gave himself up for her.
marriageMeaning: Love means sacrifice. Christ's example is laying down your preferences for your spouse's good.
prayerPrompt: Lord, help me love sacrificially, putting my spouse's needs before my own.
actionPrompt: Give up something you want today to do something your spouse would prefer.

verseText: Greater love has no one than this: to lay down one's life for one's friends.
marriageMeaning: Daily sacrifices—time, preferences, comfort—are how you lay down your life in marriage.
prayerPrompt: God, show me how to lay down my life for my spouse in practical ways today.
actionPrompt: Sacrifice 20 minutes of your preferred activity to spend quality time with your spouse.

verseText: Do nothing out of selfish ambition... but in humility value others above yourselves.
marriageMeaning: Marriage thrives when you both prioritize each other. Selfishness starves connection.
prayerPrompt: Father, remove selfishness from my heart and help me value my spouse above myself.
actionPrompt: Ask your spouse what they need today and make it happen, even if inconvenient.

verseText: Trust in the LORD with all your heart and lean not on your own understanding.
marriageMeaning: Trusting God with your marriage takes pressure off trying to control everything.
prayerPrompt: Lord, I trust You with my marriage. Guide us in Your ways.
actionPrompt: Surrender one worry about your marriage to God today. Write it down and pray over it.

verseText: Her husband has full confidence in her and lacks nothing of value.
marriageMeaning: Being trustworthy builds your spouse's confidence in you. Reliability creates security.
prayerPrompt: Help me be someone my spouse can fully trust and rely on.
actionPrompt: Follow through on one promise you made to your spouse this week.

verseText: Love always protects, always trusts, always hopes, always perseveres.
marriageMeaning: Choosing to trust your spouse—even when it's hard—is an act of love.
prayerPrompt: God, help me trust my spouse and believe the best about them.
actionPrompt: Assume the best about your spouse's intentions in your next interaction.

verseText: The husband should fulfill his marital duty to his wife, and likewise the wife to her husband... Do not deprive each other.
marriageMeaning: Physical intimacy is a gift and responsibility. Both partners' needs matter.
prayerPrompt: Lord, help us honor each other in our physical relationship.
actionPrompt: Have an honest, judgment-free conversation about your intimacy needs this week.

verseText: Marriage should be honored by all, and the marriage bed kept pure.
marriageMeaning: Your intimate life is sacred. Protecting it from outside influences honors your covenant.
prayerPrompt: Help us keep our marriage bed pure and our intimacy honoring to You.
actionPrompt: Identify and remove one thing that's affecting your intimate connection negatively.

verseText: Drink water from your own cistern, running water from your own well.
marriageMeaning: Find your satisfaction in your spouse alone. Your marriage is your source.
prayerPrompt: God, help me find all my romantic satisfaction in my spouse.
actionPrompt: Express desire for your spouse today in a way that's meaningful to them.

verseText: If your brother or sister sins, go and point out their fault, just between the two of you.
marriageMeaning: Address issues directly with your spouse—not with friends, family, or social media.
prayerPrompt: Give me courage to address conflicts directly and privately with my spouse.
actionPrompt: If there's an unresolved issue, bring it up gently and privately today.

verseText: In your anger do not sin: Do not let the sun go down while you are still angry.
marriageMeaning: Don't let anger fester overnight. Address issues before they compound.
prayerPrompt: Lord, help us not go to bed angry. Give us the words to reconcile.
actionPrompt: Before bed tonight, clear the air on any tension—even if just saying 'I love you, let's talk tomorrow.'

verseText: Starting a quarrel is like breaching a dam; so drop the matter before a dispute breaks out.
marriageMeaning: Some fights aren't worth having. Wisdom knows when to let things go.
prayerPrompt: Give me wisdom to know when to engage and when to let go.
actionPrompt: Before starting a potentially heated conversation, ask: 'Is this worth it right now?'

verseText: All Scripture is God-breathed and is useful for teaching, rebuking, correcting and training in righteousness.
marriageMeaning: Growing together spiritually starts with being in God's Word together.
prayerPrompt: Lord, draw us deeper into Your Word together as a couple.
actionPrompt: Read one Bible passage together this week and discuss what it means for your marriage.

verseText: Let us consider how we may spur one another on toward love and good deeds, not giving up meeting together.
marriageMeaning: You and your spouse need community. Isolation weakens; connection strengthens.
prayerPrompt: Help us find and nurture community that strengthens our marriage.
actionPrompt: Plan to attend a church service or small group together this week.

verseText: But as for me and my household, we will serve the LORD.
marriageMeaning: Spiritual leadership starts with a decision. Make serving God your household's foundation.
prayerPrompt: Lord, help us make You the center of our home and marriage.
actionPrompt: Pray together tonight, even if just for 2 minutes. Make it a habit.

verseText: Give thanks in all circumstances; for this is God's will for you in Christ Jesus.
marriageMeaning: Gratitude transforms your perspective on marriage. Thank God for your spouse daily.
prayerPrompt: Father, help me cultivate a grateful heart for my spouse in all seasons.
actionPrompt: Thank your spouse for something specific today—even something small.

verseText: Give thanks to the LORD, for he is good; his love endures forever.
marriageMeaning: God's love for you models how to love your spouse—enduringly and faithfully.
prayerPrompt: Thank You, Lord, for Your enduring love. Help me reflect it to my spouse.
actionPrompt: Write down 3 things you're grateful for about your spouse and share them.

verseText: Let the peace of Christ rule in your hearts... And be thankful.
marriageMeaning: A thankful heart brings peace to your marriage. Gratitude pushes out resentment.
prayerPrompt: Let Your peace rule our hearts and fill us with gratitude for each other.
actionPrompt: Start your day by listing 3 things you appreciate about your spouse.

verseText: The LORD is the witness between you and the wife of your youth... She is your partner, the wife of your marriage covenant.
marriageMeaning: God witnessed your vows. Your marriage is a covenant, not just a contract.
prayerPrompt: Lord, help us honor the covenant we made before You.
actionPrompt: Reread or recall your wedding vows together. Recommit to one specific vow today.

verseText: So they are no longer two, but one flesh. Therefore what God has joined together, let no one separate.
marriageMeaning: God joined you together. Protect your union from anything that tries to separate you.
prayerPrompt: God, protect our marriage from anything that would try to divide us.
actionPrompt: Identify one external threat to your unity and make a plan to guard against it together.

verseText: Where you go I will go, and where you stay I will stay. Your people will be my people and your God my God.
marriageMeaning: Ruth's commitment to Naomi models spousal devotion—staying through all circumstances.
prayerPrompt: Give us Ruth-like commitment to each other through every season.
actionPrompt: Tell your spouse: 'I'm with you, no matter what. Where you go, I go.'

verseText: No temptation has overtaken you except what is common to mankind. And God is faithful; he will not let you be tempted beyond what you can bear.
marriageMeaning: Temptation isn't unbeatable—there's always an exit. God provides a way out.
prayerPrompt: God, show me the way of escape and strengthen my will.
actionPrompt: Choose your exit plan for temptation: block, leave, call spouse, or pray.

verseText: I made a covenant with my eyes not to look lustfully at a young woman.
marriageMeaning: Guarding your eyes protects your heart and your marriage. Set boundaries proactively.
prayerPrompt: Help me make a covenant with my eyes to honor my spouse.
actionPrompt: Set one new boundary today to protect your eyes and heart.
